welcome.title: Open-source i18n management. <highlight>Self-hosted. AI-powered.</highlight>
welcome.description: Manage translations, collaborate with your team, and leverage AI — all on your own server. Your data, your rules.
welcome.aiPowered: AI-powered translations with OpenAI, Claude, DeepL & Google Translate

features.title: Built for developers
features.description: Everything you need to manage i18n, with tools that fit your workflow

aiTranslation.title: AI Translation
aiTranslation.description: Translate with OpenAI, Claude, DeepL, or Google Translate. Bring your own API keys.

cliApi.title: CLI & API
cliApi.description: Pull and push translations from your terminal. Integrate with any CI/CD pipeline.

mcpIntegration.title: MCP Integration
mcpIntegration.description: Connect AI assistants to your translation data via Model Context Protocol.

multiFormat.title: Multi-format Support
multiFormat.description: JSON, XLIFF, Gettext (.po) and more. Import and export in the format your project needs.

teamwork.title: Team Collaboration
teamwork.description: Invite teammates, assign translations, and review changes in real-time.

selfHosted.title: Self-hosted & Open Source
selfHosted.description: Deploy on your infrastructure. MIT licensed, no vendor lock-in, full data ownership.

quickstart.title: Up and running in 5 minutes
quickstart.description: From zero to managing translations in three steps

configure.title: Set up
configure.description: Open localhost:3000, create your team and first project

integrate.title: Integrate
integrate.description: Sync translations with your codebase using the CLI

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Fits into your existing development workflow

cli.title: CLI
cli.description: Push and pull translations from your terminal

api.title: REST API
api.description: Full API access with API key authentication

cicd.title: CI/CD
cicd.description: Automate translation sync in your pipeline

codeExamples.pull:
# Pull translations to your project
npx transweave pull --project=my-app
codeExamples.push:
# Push local changes back
npx transweave push ./locales

cta.title: Ready to own your i18n?
cta.description: Deploy Transweave on your server and take full control of your translations.

tutorial.pageDescription: This tutorial will help you understand how to use the Transweave platform to efficiently manage multilingual translation projects, from basic features to advanced configurations.
tutorial.helpDescription: If you have other questions or need personalized support, please feel free to contact us.

overview.title: System Overview
overview.description: Transweave is a localization management platform that helps teams collaborate on translations and manage multilingual content.

steps.step1: Register an account and log in to the system

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: Basic steps from creating your first project to exporting translations.

steps.step1: Create a new project in your team

create.description: Learn how to create and manage teams, set roles and permissions.

steps.step4: Manage team permissions and access control

collaboration.description: Understand how to efficiently organize team members to work together.

setup.description: Learn how to create projects and configure them in detail.

steps.step1: Create a new project and set basic information

errors.invalidKey: Invalid key format, please enter a valid key

errors.keyConflictChild: Cannot add key "{key}", child key "{conflictKey}" already exists

tokenForm.description: Please enter key and translation fields
tokenForm.enterCommentForAi: Please enter a comment so AI can generate a multilingual key
tokenForm.uploadedToCdn: Image has been uploaded to CDN
tokenForm.uploadFailedRetry: Image upload failed, please try again
tokenForm.moduleHint: After selecting a module, the AI-generated key will automatically include the module code as a prefix
tokenForm.imageFormatHint: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP formats, max 5MB per file
tokenForm.pasteHint: Tip: You can paste screenshots directly with Ctrl/Cmd + V
tokenForm.restoreWarning: This action will overwrite all current translations with the content from this history record. Existing latest translations may be lost.

keyTooltip.description: is the unique identifier for a token and cannot be duplicated.
keyTooltip.ruleLowercase: Must start with a lowercase letter

tokenTable.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The translation data will be permanently removed.

batchAdd.title: Batch Add Translations
batchAdd.description: Enter multiple translations, one per line
batchAdd.tableDescription: Fill in the table below to add multiple translations
batchAdd.inputPlaceholder:
login.title Login page title
login.submit [auth,form] Submit button
user.welcome Welcome message

formatGuide.title: Format Guide:
formatGuide.rule3: Tags are optional, separate multiple tags with commas

tips.tableInput: Fill in Key, Tags, and Comment in the table, then batch create
tips.keyFormat: Key format: lowercase letter start, can contain letters, numbers, and dots (e.g. login.title)

import.title: Import Translations
import.description: Import translation data from files to "{projectName}" project
import.fileImportDesc: Supports JSON, CSV, XML, and YAML file formats

dragDropArea.instructions: Click or drag file here to import
dragDropArea.supportedFormats: Supports JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, XLIFF, Gettext (.po) formats

importNotes.title: Import Notes:
importNotes.jsonNote: JSON files should contain valid translation key-value pairs
importNotes.csvNote: CSV files should have headers in the first row, with keys in the first column and values in the second
importNotes.formatNote: Format will be automatically inferred based on file type
importNotes.xliffNote: XLIFF files (.xlf) import both source and target language translations
importNotes.gettextNote: Gettext files (.po) import the target language specified in the PO header

export.title: Export Translations
export.settingsDesc: Configure the export format and content
export.noLanguageSelected: No languages selected will export all languages
export.includeEmptyDesc: Include items that have not been translated yet
export.metadataDesc: Include creation time, modifier, and other info
export.fileNote: Each language will be generated as a separate file and packaged as a ZIP
export.exportSuccessDesc: Translation ZIP package has started downloading

modules.description: Manage project modules to organize and standardize translation key namespaces
